LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. THE MCBRIDE DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED "IN PERSON, BY TELEPHONE, OR BY VIDEO CONFERENCE" IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. THE RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY SEPTEMBER 19, 2024. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Set For Trial On Aug-18-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Off calendar as moot. Request for dismissal of prayer for punitive damages filed June 20, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. The McBride declaration fails to show that the parties met and conferred "in person, by telephone, or by video conference" in compliance with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to comply with the code. The response to the complaint is now due by September 19, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Continued To Oct-09-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
